summary: Phase A2 v2 redraft of EXP-211. Addresses operator HNOTE-ISS-1425-OPERATOR-SIDES-WITH-CURMUDGEON-001 findings #2 (a11y / landmark-skip), #3 (one-scroll reachability), and the additional --ink-3 contrast requirement. Plus the four curmudgeon minor edits (H1 ternary inconsistency, H2 'verbatim' overreach, H3 kicker phrasing, H4 narrative reachability claim) from monitor/curmudgeon/reviews/EXP-211-redesign-proposal.json (queue_id 240, recommended_action minor_edit). Element changes from <aside class="accuracy-math-aside"> to <section role="region" class="accuracy-math-section" aria-labelledby="accuracy-math-heading"> with a visible <h3> heading. Concrete Playwright reachability tests at 1080p/1440p/390x844 mobile replace v1's narrative '1-2 scrolls' claim. AC14 states measured WCAG 2.1 AA contrast ratios for --ink-2 and --ink-3 over --bg in both themes, all four passing AA body 4.5:1. v1 changes #1 (hero sublabel arithmetic strip) and #2 (bordered accent box delete) preserved unchanged. The 'self-serving denominator' sentence preserved verbatim per HNOTE-EXP-211-REDESIGN-REINSERT-HEADLINE-SENTENCE-001. ISS-1425 is already closed (wontfix, 2026-04-25T09:25:39Z); no re-open needed.
key_changes_from_v1:
Element:
->
with visible

Accuracy math - supporting detail

. (Operator finding #2 fix: eliminates landmark-skip a11y regression and adds heading-navigation pathway.)

Placement documented at the correct post-EXP-212 layout position: 'after sc-hero scorecard close, before Downloads heading' (v1 said 'after sc-breakdown' but no sc-breakdown block exists on Overview post-EXP-212). Concrete Playwright DOM.getBoundingClientRect() reachability tests added at 1920x1080, 2560x1440, 390x844 with explicit scrollY thresholds. (Operator finding #3 + curmudgeon H4 fix.)

AC14 states measured WCAG 2.1 AA contrast ratios for --ink-2 and --ink-3 over --bg in both themes: --ink-2 = 8.33:1 dark / 12.16:1 light; --ink-3 = 4.71:1 dark / 5.59:1 light. All four pass AA body 4.5:1. (Operator additional requirement fix.)
Defensive ${accuracyVariantList ? ... : ''} ternary now inlined in change_3.new_section_html so the integration target is self-consistent. (Curmudgeon H1 fix.)
content_preservation_audit framing softened from 'verbatim' to 'near-verbatim (minor wording polish, no clause dropped)'. (Curmudgeon H2 fix.)
Heading text changed from 'Accuracy math - detail for the calibrated reader' to 'Accuracy math - supporting detail'. (Curmudgeon H3 fix.)
preserved_from_v1: All source-code critique clauses preserved near-verbatim.
'The headline number is manually entered with a self-serving denominator' sentence preserved verbatim per HNOTE-EXP-211-REDESIGN-REINSERT-HEADLINE-SENTENCE-001.
All internal anchors retained: #p3-failures (hero card AND section), #part6 (section), #timestamp-error (new in v1, preserved in v2).

integration_hold.blocked_until: Conditional integration per HNOTE-DESIGN-REFRESH-PHASE-A2-INTEGRATION-APPROVED-CONDITIONAL-001 - once curmudgeon clears v2 (no new ESCALATE findings), decider may integrate without a fresh operator HNOTE per HNOTE-EXP-211-REDESIGN-V2-TASK-001 step 4.
unlock_checklist: (a) curmudgeon re-review of EXP-211-redesign-v2 returns no new ESCALATE-category findings
(c) AC1-AC20 acceptance criteria all pass at integration time

close_on_fix.note: ISS-1425 already closed (status: wontfix, closed 2026-04-25T09:25:39Z). Closure note already references this v2 revision as the revision-pending content. No re-open needed.

curmudgeon_request_notes: v2 of EXP-211-redesign - adversarial re-review under HNOTE-DESIGN-REFRESH-PHASE-A2-INTEGRATION-APPROVED-CONDITIONAL-001 rubric. Probes specific to v2: (a) does <section role="region" aria-labelledby> + visible <h3> actually fix the landmark-skip a11y regression? Verify via Playwright accessibility-tree snapshot (section announced as 'region' not 'complementary'; h3 enters document outline). (b) AC8/9/10 reachability measurements - run Playwright at all three viewports and confirm scrollY values match the spec. (c) AC14 contrast measurements - verify the stated ratios via independent contrast calculator (e.g., WebAIM Contrast Checker) at the actual --ink-2/--ink-3/--bg token values from EXP-202 (dark and light themes). (d) AC6 defensive-rendering test - verify the inline ternary is correctly transcribed and the test fixture forces an empty variantSources case. (e) content preservation - diff v2 section prose against v1 and against the original bordered-box prose; confirm no regression on the 'self-serving denominator' sentence. (f) NC5 computed-counts rule - grep section HTML for any hardcoded numbers outside template substitutions. (g) class rename ama-* -> ams-* - confirm no broken CSS selectors and no integrity-test regex still expecting the old prefix. (h) TOC entry behavior matches AC11 team-decided value. (i) AC18 Overview structural order matches the spec post-integration. Apply same rubric as v1 review (queue_id 240). Recommended_action expectations: minor_edit if any new findings surface, close if clean.
fuse_staleness_advisory: The EXP-211 tracker entry on the FUSE workspace had v2 fields (redraft_output_file_v2, redraft_proposal_file_v2, redraft_human_note_v2, revised_at_v2, revision_notes_v2) staged by a previous analyst session that did NOT make it to git. The clean clone from origin/main at 2026-04-25T11:30Z had no v2 fields. This proposal-writing session has updated the FUSE tracker entry's v2 fields to match the v2 file actually written; workspace-sync will eventually push the updated tracker to git. Decider note: if you read the tracker from your own clean clone before workspace-sync runs, the v2 fields will be missing. Cross-check by looking for the file at monitor/analyst/expansions/EXP-211-redesign-v2.json directly.
